title: Food Tongs 24cm, Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Kitchen Tongs for Cooking, Barbecue, Serving Scissors Tongs - Buffet Pliers
features: Material---430 (18/0) food grade stainless steel, Size: 9.45 inches/24cm.

Super Easy to Store and Clean---Thanks to the convenient hole at the handle, you can simply hang these tongs for easy storage. After using, just give this kitchen helper a good rinse using soapy water or run it in the dishwasher.

Premium Heat-resistant Stainless Steel---My Tongs is fully crafted from the best non-toxic stainless steel that will never rust or corrode. It has the ability to resist extreme heat, so you can fry food in the oil with complete ease.

Incredible Thick Comfy Grip---My Tongs is very comfortable to use and hold. The ring handles are thick, anti-slip and do not have sharp edges. The size is just decent, giving the right tension on the pivot so that the food remains in the firm grasp of the tongs.
Which is great for turning and serving all kinds of foods. making it very user friendly for dinner table or buffets.
description: The all-purpose Kitchen Tongs will come in handy for many uses. Great for home canning, as well as other common kitchen tasks. Overall length of 24cm.
